error_signature: Your Code node task was not matched to a runner within the timeout period
title: Code node task not matched to a runner
symptom: The Code node fails to execute, displaying a timeout error message. This occurs even on the first Code node in the workflow.
not_this_if: Code node executes successfully in other workflows
root_cause: The error indicates that the task runner responsible for executing the Code node is either down, not ready, or at capacity. This can happen if there are too many long-running tasks or if the instance needs to be restarted.
fix_steps: Check the status of the task runners
Try executing the Code node again
agent_instruction: Restart the n8n instance to resolve the task runner issue.
